case_title: FLEURT, LLC VS. PARTISAN PROPERTY, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-2013 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY FLEURT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PARTISAN PROPERTY, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLEURT, LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLEURT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARTISAN PROPERTY, LLC $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-21-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT FLEURT, LLC RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PARTISAN PROPERTY, LLC $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00, THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPOLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEPT.-27-2013. DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PARTISAN PROPERTY, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2013 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEPT-27-2013 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JPT BRUCE M. LUBARSKY, CLERK JEAN KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LORI CARRILLO--YOUNG AND PRITAL JEFFERY --OWNERS. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RUTH J. LEVY--MANAGER PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:33am
Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525
This cause called for Small Claims Appeal (Trial De Nove). Appellant, Partisan Property, Llc appears by Ruth J. Levy-manager/partner; Respondent, Fleurt, llc appears by Lori Carrillo-Young and Prital Jeffrey - owners. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Bruce Lubarsky.

10:55AM
Unmarked evidence returned to the parties. Matter is submitted.
